stages.representation: convergent ordered sparse m16n8k64 signed INT8 inline PTX with selector 0
stages.detail: The 4,779-byte combined LLVM IR probe (SHA-256 01600853ff696df81a849a3d804086265d07d61c7a2f24ebaf7b3f056753fccb) covered all eight variants. Pinned LLVM emitted 13,390-byte PTX (SHA-256 b370bcbebbe761bd65675ad2d2602230cc315189a1bb8cb1c4533c68b564a897) with exactly eight ordered m16n8k64 instructions at PTX 8.5 and sm_80; this record retained exact wrapping s8-by-s8 PTX with selector 0.

stages.representation: exact-floor ordered sparse m16n8k64 INT8 PTX
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted all eight exact instructions and produced a 1,464-byte cubin with SHA-256 6bcec1b1eab13da703fdade053704aa6ab00591a1b38dd7daf48ac0dec541df2. Because every probe function was unreferenced, ptxas removed their bodies; this proves assembly acceptance, not retained SASS.
